nasb.text: These three were the sons of Noah, and from these the whole earth was populated.

esv.text: These three were the sons of Noah, and from these the people of the whole earth were dispersed.

cnv.text: 這三個人是挪亞的兒子，全地的人都是從這些人播散開來的。

ccb.text: 挪亚这三个儿子的后代遍布天下。

csbs.text: 这三人是挪亚的儿子，全地的人都是从他们扩散出来的。
